tool_input.command: git remote -v && git remote show origin 2>&1 || true

gh auth status 2>&1 && gh repo view --json nameWithOwner,url,defaultBranchRef 2>&1 && gh pr list --state open --limit 20 --json number,title,headRefName,baseRefName,author,isDraft,updatedAt,url 2>&1 && gh issue list --state open --limit 20 --json number,title,author,assignees,labels,updatedAt,url 2>&1

sed -n '1,240p' README.md
find .github -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort
rg -n --hidden -g '!*.png' -g '!*.db' -g '!package-lock.json' '(TODO|FIXME|XXX|backlog|roadmap|task queue|work queue|priority|P0|P1|next action|next_action|gptodo|GitHub Issues|issues)' README.md .github docs scripts packages plugins commands skills lessons pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,320p'
sed -n '1,260p' scripts/tasks.py
sed -n '1,220p' packages/gptodo/README.md
sed -n '1,240p' packages/gptme-coordination/README.md

du -ah .claude generated_20260627_042934.png logs package-lock.json state variation_20260627_042934_001.png variation_20260627_042934_002.png variation_20260627_042934_003.png 2>/dev/null | sort -h; file generated_20260627_042934.png variation_20260627_042934_*.png logs/* state/coordination/coord.db .claude/data/sessions/*.json package-lock.json; sed -n '1,160p' logs/gptme-team.lock 2>/dev/null; for f in logs/*.json; do echo "$f"; sed -n '1,80p' "$f"; done

git rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...upstream/master; git rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...origin/master; git log --oneline --left-right --decorate HEAD...origin/master -20; git diff -- scripts/check-codex-usage.sh; git diff --numstat -- scripts/check-codex-usage.sh

sqlite3 state/coordination/coord.db '.tables' 2>&1; sqlite3 state/coordination/coord.db '.schema' 2>&1 | head -200; sqlite3 logs/ace_curation_metrics.db '.tables' 2>&1; gh pr view 1168 --json number,title,body,files,commits,headRefName,baseRefName,mergeable,reviewDecision,statusCheckRollup,url 2>&1

sqlite3 -header -column state/coordination/coord.db 'SELECT * FROM leases; SELECT * FROM messages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20; SELECT * FROM events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20; SELECT * FROM work ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 20;' 2>&1; for f in generated_20260627_042934.png variation_20260627_042934_*.png; do printf '%s: ' "$f"; head -c 300 "$f"; printf '\n'; done; node -e 'const p=require("./package-lock.json"); console.log(JSON.stringify({name:p.name,version:p.version,lockfileVersion:p.lockfileVersion,packages:Object.keys(p.packages||{}).slice(0,20)},null,2))' 2>&1; git status --porcelain=v2

gh auth status
gh issue list --repo gptme/gptme-contrib --state open --limit 100 --json number,title,labels,assignees,milestone,createdAt,updatedAt,url,author
gh pr list --repo gptme/gptme-contrib --state open --limit 100 --json number,title,isDraft,labels,reviewDecision,statusCheckRollup,createdAt,updatedAt,url,author,headRefName
find state -maxdepth 3 -type f -print -exec file {} \; 2>/dev/null
find . -maxdepth 2 -type d \( -name tasks -o -name journal -o -name todo -o -name planning \) -print

sqlite3 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' '.tables'
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT name, sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT * FROM work_claims;" 2>/dev/null || true
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT * FROM messages ORDER BY rowid;" 2>/dev/null || true
gh pr view 1168 --repo gptme/gptme-contrib --json number,title,body,author,assignees,labels,milestone,isDraft,mergeable,reviewDecision,reviews,comments,commits,files,statusCheckRollup,url
git diff -- scripts/check-codex-usage.sh
rg -n --hidden -g '!*.png' -g '!*.db' -g '!package-lock.json' '(TODO\(|TODO:|FIXME:|XXX:)' packages plugins scripts commands skills docs tests | sed -n '1,240p'

sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT 'events' AS source, count(*) AS rows FROM events UNION ALL SELECT 'work', count(*) FROM work UNION ALL SELECT 'messages', count(*) FROM messages UNION ALL SELECT 'leases', count(*) FROM leases;"
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT id,trigger_type,source,repo,number,title,state,priority,claimed_by,created_at,result FROM events ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at;"
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT task_id,claimer,status,claimed_at,expires_at,result,metadata,completed_at FROM work ORDER BY claimed_at;"
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT id,sender,recipient,channel,body,created_at FROM messages ORDER BY id;"
sqlite3 -header -column 'file:state/coordination/coord.db?immutable=1' "SELECT path,holder,acquired_at,expires_at,metadata FROM leases ORDER BY path;"
git status --short --branch

sed -n '1,80p' scripts/github/check-notifications.sh
sed -n '340,390p' packages/gptme-codegraph/src/gptme_codegraph/search.py
sed -n '1000,1045p' scripts/discord/discord_bot.py
sed -n '1,130p' .github/workflows/issue-hygiene.yml
sed -n '1,130p' .github/workflows/issue-resolver.yml
